envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Reviews are PROPOSED_NOT_REVIEWED. ADR-0081 5-stage maturity governs workflow review depth. Stage 3+ workflows require explicit policy approval + per-call governance.

items.name: Workflow Map Governance Review
items.description: Surfaces D3 Workflow Map recommendation regions for admin governance review. Stage 1 (templates) + Stage 2 (recommendations) require admin review; Stages 3-5 (proposed-action / governed execution / continuous optimization) require explicit policy approval + per-call governance.
items.human_readable_summary: Admin reviews workflow stage progression. Stages 1-2 baseline; Stages 3-5 require explicit policy approval + dual-control for risky writes.
items.model_usage_notes: Stage 1-2 workflows can land with standard admin approval. Stages 3-5 require named policy approver per ADR-0081 + dual-control per ADR-0026 for risky writes.

region_reviews.approval_chain_role: Otzar Administrator + Workflow Owner + Policy Approver

escalation_path: Policy Approver → Founder (ESCALATE_TO_FOUNDER for Stage 4-5 review)
DMW_scope_implications: Approved workflows bound workflow-scoped DMW provenance per ADR-0081
Stage 3+ workflows constrain Authority Map DMW scope downstream
Safe-fallback workflows operate inside baseline DMW scope only
governance_review_points: Admin must approve every workflow stage progression
Stages 3-5 require Policy Approver + per-call governance
Dual-control mandatory for risky writes regardless of stage
Workflow purpose binding required at activation per ADR-0081
forbidden_defaults: Stage 3+ approval without explicit Policy Approver sign-off
